description: This Kotlin class, TokenStore, manages secure storage and retrieval of authentication tokens using Android's EncryptedSharedPreferences, encapsulating encryption keys with MasterKey and providing methods to save, load, and clear token data.

classes.name: TokenStore
classes.description: Class for storing and retrieving authentication tokens securely using encrypted shared preferences.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Stores access token, refresh token, and expiry time into encrypted preferences.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Retrieves stored tokens and expiry time, returning a TokenPair object if available and valid.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all stored token data from preferences.
